title: ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN with negative DEFAULT value
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String NOT NULL, score Int32 DEFAULT -10);
SELECT name, score FROM test_table WHERE score < 0;
ALTER TABLE test_table MODIFY COLUMN score Nullable(Int32);
UPDATE test_table SET score = NULL WHERE name = 'Alice';
key_bug_features: ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN with negative DEFAULT value
